creator: gaod@hychen.org
text:
Hi,

I submitted this pr.

Please commit it if there are no other issues. Thank you.

2013/6/26 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of textproc/apache-solr,
>
> Please note that PR ports/179982 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/179982
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
